title: AI Tools
description: A mod that adds tools capable of learning from their actions!
body:
AI Tools introduces a brand-new set of intelligent tools to Minecraft. Unlike regular tools, these picks, shovels, axes, and hoes learn and evolve based on how you use them.
Features

- Learning Tools – Your tools grow stronger as you break blocks. Each block type mined helps them adapt and improve their efficiency.
- Dynamic Mining Speed – Tools start off weak against unfamiliar blocks, but learn how to handle them over time.
- Upgradeable Abilities – Unlock powerful effects such as Fortune, Efficiency, and large-scale mining (3x3, 5x5, and beyond).
- Gem System – Insert special gems to accelerate progression and enhance your tools.
- AI Computer – Use the in-game computer to obtain, combine, and upgrade your AI-powered tools.
- Mod Compatibility – Fully compatible with REI and JEI for smooth integration.
- Fully Configurable – Configure every aspect of the mod with the in-game configuration screen.

Turn your tools into companions that grow alongside you, making every mining adventure smarter and more rewarding.

 
You need help, you have a bug that you want to report to us or you just want to speak with nice people ? Join our discord server :  https://discord.gg/Xb2nPmN
